round_id.description: RoundID is the stable identifier for the review round.

kind.description: Kind is the review kind for the round.

anchor_sha.description: AnchorSHA is the controller-chosen git commit anchor recorded for delta review when the round uses one.

step.description: Step is the tracked plan step number when the round is step-scoped.

revision.description: Revision is the plan-local revision associated with the round.

review_title.description: ReviewTitle is the human-readable title for the round when one exists.

plan_path.description: PlanPath is the tracked or archived plan path associated with the round.

plan_stem.description: PlanStem is the durable plan stem associated with the round.

created_at.description: CreatedAt is the round creation timestamp.

oneOf.description: Dimensions lists the materialized reviewer slots for the round.

dimensions.description: Dimensions lists the materialized reviewer slots for the round.

ledger_path.description: LedgerPath is the path to the round ledger artifact.

aggregate_path.description: Aggregate is the path to the round aggregate artifact.

submissions_dir.description: Submissions is the path to the round submissions directory.

ReviewManifest.description: ReviewManifest is the command-owned review manifest artifact for one review round.

name.description: Name is the human-readable dimension label.

slot.description: Slot is the stable slot identifier.

instructions.description: Instructions is the reviewer prompt for this slot.

submission_path.description: SubmissionPath is the target path for this slot's submission artifact.

ReviewManifestSlot.description: ReviewManifestSlot describes one reviewer submission slot in a review manifest.

title: Review manifest artifact
description: Command-owned review manifest artifact for one review round.
